name: Mercado Pago
description: Access payments, refunds, and customer data from Mercado Pago — the leading payment platform in Latin America. Used widely in Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, and Colombia.

auth.hint: Go to mercadopago.com.br/developers → Your credentials → Access Token (Production or Test).

tools.name: get_payment
tools.description: Get details for a specific Mercado Pago payment: amount, status, payer, and payment method.

tools.name: search_payments
tools.description: Search payments with filters for date range, status, and payment method.

params.name: status
params.description: Payment status: approved, pending, rejected, refunded, cancelled

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Get a Mercado Pago customer's profile and saved cards.

tools.name: search_customers
tools.description: Search customers by email in Mercado Pago.

params.name: email
params.description: Customer email address to search for
